condition.ptxt: Both seatback and cushion do not become hot although seat heater switch is ON

action.ptxt: Replace fuse and check for short circuit.
Refer to Seat Heater Switch Inspection (If Equipped) .

ps.ptxt: Faulty seat heater circuit in seatback and/or seat cushion

action.ptxt: Refer to Seat Heater Wire Inspection (If Equipped) .

condition.ptxt: Only seatback does not become hot although seat heater switch is ON

ps.ptxt: Faulty seat heater circuit in seatback and/or seat cushion

action.ptxt: Refer to Seat Heater Wire Inspection (If Equipped) .

condition.ptxt: Only seat cushion does not become hot although seat heater switch is ON

ps.ptxt: Faulty seat heater circuit in seat cushion

action.ptxt: Refer to Seat Heater Wire Inspection (If Equipped) .
